description_long: This helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic design with a predominantly black visor and a shell that combines red, gray, and black panels. The front is dominated by a large, dark, full-face visor that provides extensive facial coverage. The sides and rear of the helmet display a mix of matte and glossy finishes, with metallic gray vent covers and sculpted red sections for added style and structure. The top of the helmet includes two circular vent covers and a central raised ridge, suggesting integrated ventilation. The lower sides are covered with a light gray, fabric-like material, likely for comfort and fit. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban motorcycling or similar activities, with a modern, high-tech aesthetic.
description: A modern, full-face helmet with a black visor, red and gray shell, and metallic vent details, featuring a sleek, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark full-face visor and the helmet's symmetrical, streamlined shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the red and gray paneling, circular vent, and the light gray fabric-like lower section.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the red back panel, two circular gray vents, and a central raised ridge for ventilation.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same vent, paneling, and fabric-like lower section.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two circular vents on the top rear, one on each side, with additional small vent details on the sides near the visor.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract geometric design with red, gray, and black panels; no text or imagery.
